2605.02780.title: Fine-Grained Graph Generation through Latent Mixture Scheduling
2605.02780.paper_summary: Structure aware graph generation aims to generate graphs that satisfy given topological properties. It has applications in domains such as drug discovery, social network modeling, and knowledge graph construction. Unlike existing methods that only provide coarse control over graph properties, we introduce a novel conditional variational autoencoder for fine-grained structural control in graph generation. The approach refines the decoder's latent space by dynamically aligning graph- and property-driven representations to improve both graph fidelity and control satisfaction. Specifically, the approach implements a mixture scheduler that progressively integrates graph and control priors. Experiments on five real-world datasets show the efficacy of the proposed model compared to recent baselines, achieving high generation quality while maintaining high controllability.
2605.02780.paper_summary_zh: 結構感知圖生成旨在生成滿足給定拓撲性質的圖。它在藥物發現、社交網絡建模和知識圖譜構建等領域有應用。與僅提供粗略控制圖屬性的方法不同，我們引入了一種新穎的條件變分自編碼器，以實現圖生成中的細粒度結構控制。該方法通過動態對齊圖和屬性驅動的表示來細化解碼器的潛在空間，以提高圖的真實性和控制滿意度。具體而言，該方法實現了一個混合調度器，逐步整合圖和控制先驗。對五個真實世界數據集的實驗顯示，與最近的基線相比，所提出的模型的有效性，實現了高生成質量，同時保持高可控性。
2605.02780.author: Nidhi Vakil et.al.
